title: evaluation_caveats
text:
Classifier outputs clip-level predictions only.

Timing claims are geometry-derived.

Person-level attribution is heuristic.

The VLM must not override classifier verdicts.

title: examples
text:
Example 1:

Two individuals rapidly approached each other and physical contact occurred.

Violence detected.

---

Example 2:

People stood and talked without aggressive actions.

Non-violence detected.

title: non_violence
text:
Walking

Conversation

Handshake

Eating

Standing

Horse riding

People gathering peacefully

title: violence_taxonomy
text:
Bare-hand fight

Weapon involved fight

Group assault

Aggressive pushing

Punching

Kicking

Physical confrontation
